creator: fbsdports@westryn.net
text:
Created attachment 223759
patch to update erlang-runtime23 from 23.2.7 to 23.3.1

This patch updates lang/erlang-runtime23 to the latest maintenance release for version 23.  In addition, it fixes selecting the ODBC option.

I noticed in testing that when selecting the NATIVE option, that there is a hipe error.  Since it looks like hipe is not being maintained, I wonder if both the NATIVE and HIPE options should be dropped.

If this update is acceptable, I would like to upgrade lang/erlang, lang/erlang-doc, lang/erlang-java, lang/erlang-man, and lang/erlang-wx as a next step in bringing the default Erlang version up to date.

Kim
